subcodes.first_line: O valiant Rostam of Zabul, though thou wert the champion in the field of manliness and in physical might didst excel all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای تهمتن رستم زابلی هر چند شهسوار میدان مردانگی بود و بقوه جسمانی فائق بر هر
subcodes.subjects: @The Holy Spirit, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @being a source of light; guidance
